name: East West Bancorp, Inc.
description: East West Bancorp, Inc. is a publicly traded bank holding company for East West Bank, the largest independent bank headquartered in Southern California. Founded in 1973, the company operates as a premier financial bridge between the United States and Greater China. East West Bank provides a full range of consumer and commercial banking services, including commercial real estate, corporate banking, treasury management, and wealth management, serving customers through over 120 locations in the U.S. and Asia.
